deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this apartment?
name: Name
searchByNameAreaPrice: Search by name, area or price
title: Project Apartments
syncError: No apartments with the same area and number of rooms to synchronize

syncDialog.title: Apartment Data Synchronization
syncDialog.notChangedHint: Apartment number, floor, area, and room count will remain unchanged
syncDialog.floorDuplicateDescription: Choose what to copy to other floors and review safe matches before starting.
syncDialog.copyFloorImageHint: Create or update the floor plan on other floors.
syncDialog.copyApartmentPolygonsHint: Copy only polygons that were matched safely.
syncDialog.matchingCriteriaOrderHint: Order matters: enabled items are tried from 1 to 3. For each source polygon, the first rule that finds exactly one target unit is used; the rest are skipped for that polygon.
syncDialog.ruleNumberWithFloorPrefixFields: Compared fields: apartment number (floor digit in the number is replaced with the target floor).
syncDialog.ruleExactNumberFields: Compared fields: apartment number (same text on the target floor).
syncDialog.ruleAreaRoomsTypeFields: Compared fields: area (rounded), room count, and unit type.
syncDialog.ruleNumberWithFloorPrefix: By apartment number with floor-prefix replacement
syncDialog.ruleExactNumberHint: Use when apartment numbers stay identical across floors.
syncDialog.ruleAreaRoomsTypeHint: Used only for a unique pair; ambiguous matches are skipped.
syncDialog.noTargetFloors: There are no other floors available for duplication.
syncDialog.noCopyOptions: Choose at least one data type to copy.
syncDialog.noMatchingRules: Choose at least one matching rule for polygons.
syncDialog.previewFloorImageSkip: Floor plan is already up to date
syncDialog.floorDuplicateSuccess: Duplication complete: floor plans {{floorPlans}}, polygons {{polygons}}, skipped {{skipped}}
syncDialog.filterByAttributesHint: Only apartments that match every selected attribute are listed.
syncDialog.noTargetsAfterFilter: No apartments match the selected filters. Turn some filters off.
